$comment: Intentionally-unwired indicator artifacts. Every entry blocks the catalogue-coverage drift detector from failing. Adding a new artifact to datasets/indicators/in/ MUST be paired with EITHER (a) a topic-catalogue.json entry OR (b) an entry here with a reason. Removing an entry here without wiring it is the ratchet that closes the gap (see TODO/VIZ-LAYER-GAPS-PLAN.md Phase 0). The reason field is plain English; tag with the phase it belongs to so the audit trail is legible.

phase3-pending (economy extension): quarterly grain; blocked on formatTimeLabel (Phase 1).
phase3-pending (economy extension): GDP/GNI/NNI/NDP composite; needs multi-series picker.
phase3-pending (economy extension): state-level constant-price NSDP totals; complements existing per-capita view.
phase3-pending (economy extension): nominal NSDP; needs SnapshotBadge (Phase 2) since current-prices mislead growth.
phase3-pending (economy extension): RBI-spliced long history; blocked on splitOnBreaks + SeriesBreakAnnotation (Phase 1+2).
phase3-pending (economy extension): superseded by _long; keep on disk for diff-checks but do not wire.
